zh.lifeSummary: 當Dreux III de MELLO於大約1240年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾沙吉布利勒-文時，他的父親Dreux II de Mello67歲，母親Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES27歲。他於大約1245年與Adélaïde de MONTREAL結婚。他去世於1310年4月23日享年71歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達蒙特巴德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dreux III de MELLO于大约1240年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾沙吉布利勒-文时，他的父亲Dreux II de Mello67岁，母亲Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES27岁。他于大约1245年与Adélaïde de MONTREAL结婚。他去世于1310年4月23日享年71岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達蒙特巴德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: MELLO
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Adelino, Ana, Joaquin, Acacio, Claudio, Cristina, Fernando, Americo, Enrique.  Portuguese Duarte, Joaquim, Armanda, Joao, Paulo, Serafim.
Italian: probably from a short form of a personal name ending with the hypocoristic suffix -ello, such as Giacomello from Giacomo .

variants.name: Giacomo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenico, Gino, Salvatore.
Italian: from the personal name Giacomo, from Latin Jacobus via Late Latin Jacomus (see James and Jacob ).

variants.name: Melle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Horst, Kurt, Otto.
Italian: habitational name from Melle in Cuneo province (Piedmont); in some cases possibly also a variant of a personal name such as   Mello   1.
Norwegian: probably a variant of   Mele  .

variants.name: Mellone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Emidio, Luigi, Pasquale.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Mello  .

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, now used as a given name throughout the English-speaking world. In the 20th century it was particularly popular in Australia. The surname was originally a Norman baronial name, but a precise identification of the place from which it was derived has not been made (there are a large number of possible candidates). The Bruces were an influential Norman family in Scottish affairs in the early Middle Ages; its most famous member was  Robert  ‘the Bruce’ (  1274–1329 ), who is said to have drawn inspiration after his defeat at Methven from the perseverance of a spider in repeatedly climbing up again after being knocked down. He ruled Scotland as  King Robert I  from  1306 to 1329 .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Dreux III de MELLO was born about 1240, in Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Dreux II de Mello, was 67 and his mother, Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES, was 27. He married Adélaïde de MONTREAL about 1245. He died on 23 April 1310, at the age of 71, and was buried in Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dreux III de MELLO est né environ 1240, à Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Dreux II de Mello, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Adélaïde de MONTREAL environ 1245. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1310, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dreux III de MELLO um 1240 in Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dreux II de Mello 67 und seine Mutter Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES 27. Er hat um 1245 Adélaïde de MONTREAL geheiratet. Er starb am 23. April 1310 im Alter von 71 Jahren und wurde in Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dreux III de MELLO è nato il circa 1240 nel Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Dreux II de Mello, aveva 67 anni e il suo madre, Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Adélaïde de MONTREAL circa 1245. Morì il 23 aprile 1310, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Dreux III de MELLOが約1240年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンサイント-ブリス-レ-ヴィンエウックスで生まれた時，父Dreux II de Melloは67歳，母Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSESは27歳であった。約1245年にAdélaïde de MONTREALと結婚した。彼は1310年4月23日に71歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルモントバードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dreux III de MELLO(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 세인트-브리스-레-빈우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dreux II de Mello(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1245년 Adélaïde de MONTREAL(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1310년 4월 23일 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 몽바드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dreux III de MELLO nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Dreux II de Mello, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Adélaïde de MONTREAL aproximadamente 1245. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1310, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dreux III de MELLO родился около 1240 г. в местности сеинт-брис-ле-ваинеукс, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Dreux II de Mello было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Adélaïde de MONTREAL около 1245 г. Он умер 23 апреля 1310 г. в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности монтбард, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dreux III de MELLO nació aproximadamente 1240, en Saint-Bris-le-Vineux, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Dreux II de Mello, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Helvis de MONTBARD EPOISSES, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Adélaïde de MONTREAL aproximadamente 1245. Murió el 23 de abril de 1310, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Montbard, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
